title: image-builder  bug fix update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[45-1.0.1]
- Bump to v45 [JIRA: OLDIS-50164]
- v43 to include merged BIB code
- Fix anaconda-iso mTLS key extraction
- Bump osbuild/images to 0.231.0
- Merge upstream spec file
- Refactor all existing Oracle patches to accomodate version bump [OLDIS-50154]
- Obsolete bootc-image-builder package
full_text:
[45-1.0.1]
- Bump to v45 [JIRA: OLDIS-50164]
- v43 to include merged BIB code
- Fix anaconda-iso mTLS key extraction
- Bump osbuild/images to 0.231.0
- Merge upstream spec file
- Refactor all existing Oracle patches to accomodate version bump [OLDIS-50154]
- Obsolete bootc-image-builder package

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-50066.html
